landingTitle: InvesTax — Investment Tax Calculator for Romania
landingDesc: Calculate your Romanian investment taxes. Upload your Trading212 statement, get capital gains tax, dividend tax, and CASS — fast and accurate.
calculatorDesc: Calculate your Romanian capital gains tax, dividend tax, and CASS contributions for free. No account required.
pricingDesc: Upload your Trading212 statement and get a complete tax report. One-time annual payment, launch pricing available.
dashboardDesc: View your saved tax calculations and reports.
uploadDesc: Upload your Trading212 PDF or CSV statement for automatic tax calculation.
resultsDesc: Your complete Romanian investment tax breakdown: capital gains, dividends, CASS, and D212 filing amounts.
filingGuideDesc: Step-by-step guide for filing your Romanian investment tax declaration (D212).
loginDesc: Log in to your InvesTax account to access your saved tax calculations.
signupDesc: Create your InvesTax account. Free tax calculator included, no credit card required.
resetPasswordDesc: Set a new password for your InvesTax account.
settingsDesc: Manage your InvesTax account settings, language, and preferences.
privacyDesc: How InvesTax handles your personal data. GDPR compliant.
termsDesc: Terms and conditions for using InvesTax.
contactDesc: Get in touch with the InvesTax team. We respond within 24 hours on business days.
statusDesc: Current operational status of InvesTax services.
notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
